name: Baked Fillet of Catfish Creole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place catfish fillets in a baking pan with 1-inch lip.
2. Cover with Creole sauce.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
4. In a heavy pot, sauté seasonings in butter until done (10 minutes).
5. Add tomato sauce and water, bring to a rapid boil, then reduce to simmer. Stir occasionally and cook approximately one hour. Add water to retain volume.
6. Season with salt and cayenne pepper to taste.
7. Yields 4 servings.
